conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For the new dashboard rewrite I'm weighing React, Vue, and Svelte.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: React has the biggest ecosystem, that's a plus for hiring.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Vue's docs are really approachable, might be easier to onboard newer folks.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to book a dentist appointment sometime this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Svelte compiles away most of the runtime, so the bundle would probably be a lot smaller.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The dashboard does load a ton of charts, so bundle size actually matters more than usual here.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My upstairs neighbor's washing machine has been leaking into my ceiling.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Still torn between React for the ecosystem and Svelte for the performance.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The plumber said the leak was from a loose hose, should be fixed by Thursday.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I did a quick prototype in Svelte and the initial load time was noticeably faster than the current React version.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: React would mean less retraining but I keep coming back to how much snappier the Svelte version felt.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to renew my library card, it expired last month.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We've settled on Svelte for the dashboard rewrite. The prototype's load time improvement was the deciding factor, and the smaller bundle size will help on lower-end devices too.

query: What framework did the user decide to use for the dashboard rewrite?
